pilot_config.note: Pilot sample size n=100 per requirements. n=16 too small (signal reversal risk).

pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Condition B not significantly worse than D (delta < 0.05), Condition C not significantly better than A (delta < 0.05)
pilot_tasks.fallback: If stochastic hierarchy shows purely random absorption, document as degenerate case

pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Absorption monotonically increases with hierarchy strength (no reversal)
pilot_tasks.fallback: If non-monotonic, expand to 5 strength levels for full experiment

pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Detectable difference in absorption across L0 levels (delta > 0.1)
pilot_tasks.fallback: If no difference, use L0 {8, 128} for stronger contrast

pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Safety features show non-zero absorption signal (mean > 0.05)
pilot_tasks.fallback: If Gemma Scope fails to load, fallback to GPT-2 Small features

h_mech_pilot.continue_to_full: B ≈ D within 0.05 AND C ≈ A within 0.05
h_mech_pilot.abandon: Random encoder achieves same absorption as trained (decoder geometry confirmed)

h_comp_pilot.abandon: Zero correlation between hierarchy strength and absorption

h_pareto_pilot.continue_to_full: Delta > 0.1 in absorption across L0 levels

h_safe_gemma_pilot.continue_to_full: Safety mean absorption > 0.05 AND variance comparable to non-safety
h_safe_gemma_pilot.revise_and_retry: Relax matching criteria for non-safety controls
h_safe_gemma_pilot.abandon: Gemma Scope SAE fails to load (model access issue)

notes.gemma_scope_access: Requires sae-lens pretrained SAE registry. May need huggingface token if gated.
notes.stochastic_hierarchy: Epsilon noise N(0, 0.05) added to parent-child cosine similarities
notes.sensitivity_metric: Use simplified steering coefficient from Hu et al. 2025: var(steering_effect) / mean(steering_effect)
